topics.title: Gambling Stories and Miss Howard Stern
topics.summary: The studio discusses a guest's recent gambling wins, the history of a former listener's lost fortune from a royal flush, and a phone call from a fan expressing depression.

topics.title: American Idol Sanjaya Support and Legal Threats
topics.summary: The studio discusses the promotion of contestant Sanjaya Malakar, the involvement of various fans in hunger strikes to support him, and a legal threat from Bill O'Reilly regarding the disruption of American Idol.

topics.title: American Idol Controversy and Miami Paparazzi
topics.summary: The show explores the legal implications of intentional interference with American Idol's production, the influence of Howard Stern on viewer behavior, and a personal account of dealing with paparazzi in Miami.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Film Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news regarding Howard Stern's vacation, the absurdity of Steven Seagal action films, and personal anecdotes from a concert featuring Greg Allman.

topics.title: Musical Jam Sessions and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the dynamics of long musical jams, critiques of specific radio stations, and a segment regarding sports media figures.

topics.title: Radio Host Controversy and Diamond Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses the fallout of a co-host's offensive remarks, the lack of corporate consequences for his actions, and transitions into a conversation about engagement rings and blood diamonds.

topics.title: Comedy Central Acquisition and Weight Loss Contest
topics.summary: The show covers the acquisition of film rights by Comedy Central, celebrity endorsements for American Idol's Sanjaya, and a weight loss competition among staff members.

topics.title: Weight Loss Contest Results
topics.summary: The studio tracks the progress of several participants in a weight-loss competition, ultimately determining who moves forward to compete for a cash prize.

topics.title: Wrestling Trivia and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio hosts a wrestling trivia contest with guests before transitioning into a discussion regarding media controversies, public apologies, and the nature of comedy.

topics.title: Controversy Over Racial Remarks and Public Apology
topics.summary: The studio explores the fallout of a controversial public statement regarding racial stereotypes and the subsequent debate over whether personal history or charitable work justifies offensive remarks.

topics.title: Playboy Centerfold Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with a new Playboy centerfold regarding her photoshoot, personal life, and upcoming appearances.

topics.title: Guest Appearances and Scripted Scenes
topics.summary: The studio features a guest reading from The Godfather, the introduction of a new member to the Whack Pack, and a discussion regarding a controversial apology clip.

topics.title: Howard 100 News and Celebrity Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of segments including a discussion on fisting, updates on Robin Quivers' upcoming race, reports on Jay Leno's comedy, and news regarding Jenna Jameson.

topics.title: Pop Culture News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including the safety issues following a cruise ship capsizing, the death of cartoonist Bill Scott, celebrity legal battles involving Kevin Costner and Elizabeth Hurley, and the upcoming paternity results for Anna Nicole Smith's baby.

topics.title: Iraq War and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the production history of "The Christmas Story," a new book regarding the Iraq War, political tensions involving Madeleine Albright and Nancy Pelosi, and various updates from reality television and Hollywood.
